description: Configuration file for ESLint, extending Next.js core web vitals and TypeScript rules using the @eslint/eslintrc package.

methods.name: fileURLToPath
methods.description: Converts a file URL to a file system path.

methods.name: dirname
methods.description: Returns the directory name of a path.

methods.name: compat.extends
methods.description: Extends ESLint configurations from specified config packages.
